subject: URGENT: Shipping label generated but package never left warehouse
body: I placed order ord_00311 six days ago. Tracking shows a shipping label was created but the package has not been picked up. Can you check with the shipping carrier and update the tracking info? This is for a birthday gift and I need it to arrive on time.
